title: Bosch Professional six-part screwdriver set (cross-headed and slotted screwdriver, continuous steel blade and steel cap)
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: The six-part screwdriver set from the hand tool range for screwdriving, chiselling and loosening tightly-fixed screws
Extremely robust thanks to universal stainless steel blade, solid steel cap and hardened tip
Comfortable usage due to soft grips and ergonomic shapes
Professional screwdriver sets – robust screwdrivers for tough jobs
Items included: 2 x PH 125 mm, 1 x PH 100 mm, 1 x SL6.5 125 mm, 1 x SL5.5 100 mm, 1 x SL4.5 100 mm, 1 x SL3.5 75 mm, plastic half inlay for L-BOXX, box
description: From the manufacturer Bosch Professional hand tools: Quality at your fingertips Our sturdy professional hand tools help to overcome all everyday challenges Bosch Professional Screwdrivers What is impressive about the Bosch Professional screwdriver from the hand tool range for screwdriving, chiselling and loosening seized screws is its high quality and huge variety of well-designed additional features. Previous page Universal The integrated cap lets a person use the screwdriver for a huge variety of applications – including as a chisel. Practical The screwdriver range can handle the most common sizes and is, therefore, suitable for most screw heads. Well-designed Maximum user-friendliness due to ergonomics, soft grip structures and practical marking of the screwdrivers. Next page Previous page Solid metal shank Our screwdrivers have a robust metal shank, ensuring a long service life. Extremely robust cap The metal cap makes the screwdriver extremely robust and suitable for use as a chisel Next page 1 Long lifetime 2 Robust cap Bosch Professional hand tool sets Knives set Pliers set Ring/open-ended spanner set Specifications 2 professional knives for different cutting tasks Specifications 3 professional pliers Specifications 10 ring/open-ended spanners with ratchet function, sizes 8 mm–19 mm Product material Robust aluminium housing (folding knife) Product material Includes chrome vanadium steel Product material Chrome vanadium steel Special features Quick and tool-free blade change Special features Optimised lever effect, ergonomic handle shape Special features 2 in 1 tool with ratchet function with small-angle mechanism Additional items included 3 trapezoid replacement blades included Additional items included L-BOXX inlay Additional items included Wrap bag Learn more: Bosch Professional hand tools The video showcases the product in use.
